abstract.text: A UI framework for building digital newspaper and magazine reader experiences on iOS.

inlineContent.text: PSReaderUI provides a complete, customizable interface layer on top of the PSReader SDK.
It handles edition browsing, reading, bookmarking, downloading, and more — letting you
ship a fully-featured digital publication reader with minimal integration work.
The SDK supports PageSuite’s two content systems:
— the modern system with mixed HTML and PDF content.
Consult the PageSuite portal or your account manager to determine which system your
and one or more content sections. The recommended approach

loading transitions, displaying the edition’s thumbnail, name, date, loading status.
